case_title: MOSSER COMPANIES VS. DANIEL K BUENCAMINO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUENCAMINO, DANIEL K LORENZO, FLOR A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 146 MCALLISTER STREET, APARTMENT NUMBER 621, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES AS TO DEFENDANT BUENCAMINO, DANIEL K LORENZO, FLOR A. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES AS TO DEFENDANT BUENCAMINO, DANIEL K LORENZO, FLOR A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES SERVED MAY-29-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAY-30-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT LORENZO, FLOR A.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BUENCAMINO, DANIEL K LORENZO, FLOR A.
